FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Price holding above MA20 at 158.11 with bullish momentum
Iran deal uncertainty fuels safe-haven USD demand
US 5-year yields at 4.182% support dollar strength
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised for extension as MA20 support coincides with hawkish USD dynamics.
FX.comment: USD/JPY poised for extension as MA20 support coincides with hawkish USD dynamics.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: MA20 Support Holds as Macro Catalysts Turn Positive
tldr_points: Oil price pull‑back eases inflation pressure
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 holds above MA20, buoyed by lower oil, easing geopolitical risk, and resilient tech earnings.
STOCKS.comment: Price above MA20 with supportive macro and tech earnings, indicating upside potential.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Price Below MA20 Amid Mixed Fundamentals
tldr_points: Price trades below MA20 signaling near-term bearish bias.
Fundamentals show supportive crypto adoption news but lack clear bullish catalyst.
Watch for breakdown below 73k support with targets near 70k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD trades below MA20 at 74,706; fundamentals show mixed adoption news, bias remains bearish toward 73k support!!.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with bearish order flow and cautious sentiment targets downside to 73k support.
